examples: The Salvation Army shops depend on regular supplies of saleable items.
In some religious groups, wealth was a symbol of probable salvation and high morals, and fatness a sign of wealth and well-being.
The most crooked thing about this generation is that we have created ways of salvation without God and therefore without law and forgiveness.
This is a salvation for a city straining to comply with federal air quality regulations.
Nowadays, ghettos have negative connotations, but back then this was a place of salvation.
